pi_items.source: export_result.sh script and file system inspection
Task description explicitly asks for a 200x200 meter bounding box (100m in each direction)
Task description explicitly asks for a 200x200 meter bounding box (100m in each direction)
verifier.py code checks the bounding box using this tolerance threshold

privileged_info_summary: The task requires extracting a micro-network and demand from the real-world Bologna Acosta dataset. The original network is located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_buslanes.net.xml. The agent must successfully create micro.net.xml, micro.rou.xml, and micro.sumocfg in the /home/ga/SUMO_Output directory. The target bounding box size for extraction is explicitly 200x200 meters. Due to netconvert's behavior of retaining full edges that intersect the boundary, the resulting network's convBoundary may significantly exceed this target size, though the benchmark specifies a tolerance of 150 meters.
